mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts (user_id, content, repost_of_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{content}, #{repostOfId})
mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.user_id, p.content, p.repost_of_id, p.is_deleted, p.created_at, p.updated_at, u.name AS user_name, u.department, u.profile_image_url AS user_profile_image_url, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM likes l WHERE l.post_id = p.id) AS like_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments c WHERE c.post_id = p.id AND c.is_deleted = false) AS comment_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts rp WHERE rp.repost_of_id = p.id AND rp.is_deleted = false) AS repost_count, CASE WHEN #{requesterId} IS NOT NULL THEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM likes ml WHERE ml.post_id = p.id AND ml.user_id = #{requesterId}) > 0 ELSE false END AS liked_by_me FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.id = #{id} AND p.is_deleted = false
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET content = #{content}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE posts SET is_deleted = true, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post_images (post_id, image_url, display_order) VALUES (#{postId}, #{imageUrl}, #{displayOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.user_id, p.content, p.repost_of_id, p.is_deleted, p.created_at, p.updated_at, u.name AS user_name, u.department, u.profile_image_url AS user_profile_image_url, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM likes l WHERE l.post_id = p.id) AS like_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments c WHERE c.post_id = p.id AND c.is_deleted = false) AS comment_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts rp WHERE rp.repost_of_id = p.id AND rp.is_deleted = false) AS repost_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM likes ml WHERE ml.post_id = p.id AND ml.user_id = #{requesterId}) > 0 AS liked_by_me FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.is_deleted = false AND ( p.user_id = #{requesterId} OR p.user_id IN (SELECT following_id FROM follows WHERE follower_id = #{requesterId}) ) AND p.id < #{cursor} ORDER BY p.id DESC LIMIT #{size}
SELECT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM posts WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND repost_of_id = #{originalPostId} AND is_deleted = false )

SELECT p.id, p.user_id, p.content, p.repost_of_id, p.is_deleted, p.created_at, p.updated_at, u.name AS user_name, u.department, u.profile_image_url AS user_profile_image_url, 0 AS like_count, 0 AS comment_count, 0 AS repost_count, false AS liked_by_me FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND p.repost_of_id = #{originalPostId} AND p.is_deleted = false LIMIT 1
